metadata.description: Strict skill marketplace enforcing latest official APIs across modern web stacks. Each plugin bundles framework-specific skills that forbid deprecated patterns and force current best practices.

plugins.name: vue-skills
plugins.description: Vue 3.5+ / Nuxt 4 / @nuxt/ui 4 strict conventions. Forbids Options API, mixins, hand-written raw <button>/<input>/<dialog> when Nuxt UI provides equivalents; forces <script setup>, defineModel, useTemplateRef, type-safe defineProps, and Nuxt UI v4 components.

plugins.name: tailwind-skills
plugins.description: Tailwind CSS v4 utility-first conventions for any project (Vue/React/Astro/HTML). Forbids <style scoped>, raw CSS, [var(--xxx)] arbitrary values, deprecated utilities (bg-opacity-*, flex-shrink-*, bg-gradient-to-r); forces oklch() colors, paren syntax bg-(--var), @custom-variant dark, @tailwindcss/vite for Vite.

plugins.name: typescript-skills
plugins.description: TypeScript strict type-checking conventions. Forbids any, as any, // @ts-ignore, namespace, non-const enum, untyped catch; forces strict tsconfig, unknown over any, type inference, ESM imports, const + as const over enum, useUnknownInCatchVariables narrowing.

plugins.name: go-skills
plugins.description: Go conventions for Echo v5 + sqlc + PostgreSQL. Echo handler model with HTTPError + HTTPErrorHandler centralized error handling, sentinel errors with errors.Is/errors.As, %w wrap chain, graceful shutdown. sqlc v2 codegen with generated Querier interface, no hand-written SQL when sqlc applies.

plugins.name: node-skills
plugins.description: Fastify v5 plugin and route conventions for Node/TypeScript. Async plugins, fastify-plugin (fp) for cross-scope decorators, JSON schema validation on every route, encapsulation by default, graceful onClose shutdown.

plugins.name: postgres-skills
plugins.description: PostgreSQL schema design and migration safety. Snake_case naming, BIGSERIAL/UUID PK, timestamptz, explicit FK ON DELETE, jsonb only for schemaless data. Migration safety: idempotent guards, no destructive ops without approval, NOT NULL with default or three-step migration, CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY, no atomic column rename.

plugins.name: astro-skills
plugins.description: Astro 6+ static-first conventions. Zero JS by default, pick lightest client:* directive (visible/idle over load), server:defer for personalized islands instead of full SSR, Content Collections with typed schemas over Astro.glob.
